item.title: An interesting lesson on testosterone.
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Repost but hope seems apt for today
item.description:
Most viral edit: Thanks for the awards and upvotes y'all! Just like the author of the post, I didn't worry too much about the technical details or facts. I think of the Mr Rogers quote as my main takeaway: "My mother would say to me, 'Look for the helpers. You will always find people who are helping. 'To this day, especially in times of disaster, I remember my mother's words, and I am always comforted by realizing that there are still so many helpers — so many caring people in this world." Original post below This is saved in my favorites and I refer to it at least once a month, maybe more. I have a feeling I am going to lean on this a lot more for the next few years. There are times when I will get overwhelmed and want to walk away from everything, I'm hoping a part of me remembers to come back to this post and not do that. I have the text memorized and I could write down most of it if I lost this post. But I am grateful to the original poster and wanted to make sure to give them the credit they deserve: https://imgur.com/gallery/PYYeTxm
Dog tax: it took Charlie 4 months to trust me enough to do this.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: My hero's name is HappyMirror
item.description:
These two videos came from this dump https://imgur.com/gallery/little-bit-of-everything-first-dump-NyGkyBi#/ a few months ago They have drastically improved my life
Hats off to you, @HappyMirror

item.title: Its a banger
item.description: The extra white void in the video is to help you look for that firestick remote that's been under your nightstand since last night. Here's the actual source since everyone is going to be asking for it: https://youtu.be/6v_R180kIGs?si=ldv2a96f0PfiafV-
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
sort of
that's unsettling
true, dudes liked to travel apparently
almost as if these places were named long ago
finally
an acceptable answer
i want to be that frog
same
usersub newest is the best
i guess
as is tradition
wait what
such a great movie
not sure i believe that
obviously
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Took me a while to see it.

item.title: It took me 3 days to finish, but here it is
item.description: 30x40cm watercolour painting of poppy fields with a windmill and a house I'm a travelling campervan living artist who likes to spread good vibes around and dreams of living off art some day.
item.dc:creator: dbrylka

item.title: We have to laugh. Gives us life.
item.dc:creator: roaduardo

item.title: For all of you beautiful people out there
item.description: I don't know how to put this in any other way. This is for my LGBTQ+ people in the US. If you have the means to come to the UK but you need an initial place to stay to get settled, my home is open for you! I understand you might be scared and hesitant. After all I am just some rando. I understand you might find this post dramatic and over the top, then please skip. I want to do what I can to make someone feel safe. I am totally okay if this dies in usersub ;)
item.dc:creator: CaptainNoodle42

item.dc:creator: kmcshane

item.title: Squirrel Girl!
item.description:
MY FRIENDS ARE HERE!!!! Is anyone else playing Marvel Rivals a lot lately? I’ve been sick for almost a couple weeks now and haven’t left my place much, so when I’m not working I’ve just been playing it a lot. I LOVE playing as : Cloak and Dagger and the Invisible Woman. I wanted to draw Squirrel Girl cuz her design is just soooo cute. I’m branching out to more fanart, so if you’re interesting in seeing more of that or have any requests, feel free to comment. Alternate version: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
MY FRIENDS ARE HERE!!!! Is anyone else playing Marvel Rivals a lot lately? I’ve been sick for almost a couple weeks now and haven’t left my place much, so when I’m not working I’ve just been playing it a lot. I LOVE playing as : Cloak and Dagger and the Invisible Woman. I wanted to draw Squirrel Girl cuz her design is just soooo cute. I’m branching out to more fanart, so if you’re interesting in seeing more of that or have any requests, feel free to comment. Alternate version: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Memes vol 474 Marvel
item.description:
Y’all there is SO MUCH Bucky in this and I will not apologize
MY TWO FAVORITE THINGS
ROMA WANDA MY BELOVED
This was my phone background for a really long time- Billy is not having a good day
AND THEY AGED UP KATE SO WE CANT HAVE THIS IN THE MCU
I’m posting this every marvel dump idgaf
I immediately made this connection between him and Tommy on the cover when I saw this- I freaked out- it’s the exact same
THEY NEVER ADDRESSED THIS DID THEY
This is the funniest thing I’ve ever seen
Posting this on every single marvel dump UNTIL THE COMICS FUCKING ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THEY EVER WROTE IT IN THE FIRST PLACE HELLO MARVEL WHAT DOES THIS MEAN DO SOMETHING WITH TOMMY IM ON MY HANDS AND KNEES
Scruffy and Froggy tax
Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax https://imgur.com/gallery/6RWpXwl
item.dc:creator: danat101
